source: CT6-6 requirements §2 (CO-1 … CO-3): a closeout agent that fires before compaction, reviews docs vs the requirements, and updates stale docs itself — component 2 of the in-repo tier

scenarios: a code change with no doc update is flagged before compaction
a new surface with only a CHANGELOG touch is still flagged
acceptance_criteria: PreCompact hook wired in hooks.json (first PreCompact wiring)
stdlib-only engine hooks/closeout_check.py classifies changed files + emits signals
porcelain parser handles rename/staged-add/copy/spaced paths
new-surface-undocumented keys off README/CLAUDE/CODEBASE_MAP not any currency doc

scenarios: the contract documents review + self-update + the boundary
acceptance_criteria: skills/closeout/SKILL.md reviews vs the requirement + updates if lax (CO-2/CO-3)
agents/closeout-agent.md Write-only bounded to the inventory, works from the working-tree diff outside a pipeline run
reuses documentation-currency + the doc-updater whole-file pattern

scenarios: bad input never wedges the session
acceptance_criteria: PreCompact hook always exits 0 (never blocks/delays compaction)
fails open on unreadable payload / git failure / import failure
engine signals documented as advisory heuristics
engine inventory mirrors documentation-currency (pinned against drift)
Python stdlib-only
21st command /architect-team:closeout
plugin.json + marketplace.json = 3.18.0
43 skills / 38 agents / 21 commands across README/CLAUDE/CODEBASE_MAP
tests/test_closeout.py present + passing
engine units + signals + inventory-alignment pin
working-tree collector against a real temp git repo (rename/staged-add/spaced)
PreCompact hook subprocess (reminder/silent/fail-open)
full suite green cp1252 AND PYTHONUTF8=1

testing_authorizations.playwright: N/A — no UI/frontend surface (a PreCompact hook + a stdlib-only engine + a skill/agent contract + tests + docs).
testing_authorizations.dev_api_integration: N/A — no service API; the engine + hook are exercised by the pytest suite (incl. a real temp git repo + the hook as a subprocess).
